headline: JPMorgan Expects Kroger (KR) to Reiterate Guidance, Lowers Price Target
summary: The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) is included among the 10 Best Value Dividend Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. On June 11, JPMorgan lowered its price recommendation on The Kroger Co. (NYSE:KR) to $70 from $72 while keeping a Neutral rating on the stock. The change comes ahead of the company’s fiscal first-quarter earnings […]

headline: Walmart Tests Cross-Border E-Commerce Model With Mexico Access To U.S. Site
summary: Walmart has opened Walmart.com cross-border shopping to customers in Mexico for the first time. Shoppers in Mexico can now order from the U.S. assortment and receive international shipments with upfront duties and fees. This move expands Walmart's global e-commerce reach beyond its U.S. base. For investors watching NasdaqGS:WMT, this expansion into cross-border e-commerce comes alongside a share price of $121.04 and a very large 3 year return and 5 year return, with the 1 year return at...

headline: Symbotic Walmart Robotics Deal Reshapes Growth Outlook And Valuation Gap
summary: Symbotic has completed the acquisition of Walmart’s Advanced Systems and Robotics Business. As part of the transaction, Symbotic entered into a new commercial agreement with Walmart. The deal expands Symbotic’s automation capabilities and deepens its existing relationship with a key customer. For investors watching NasdaqGM:SYM at a share price of $41.63, this transaction is a meaningful corporate event rather than a routine update. The stock is down 35.8% year to date but up 48.8% over the...

headline: Symbotic (SYM) Is Down 5.4% After Q3 Outlook And Walmart Robotics Deal - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent weeks, Symbotic Inc. reported strong revenue growth, provided guidance for Q3 revenue of US$700 million to US$720 million and adjusted EBITDA of US$80 million to US$85 million, and completed the acquisition of Walmart’s Advanced Systems and Robotics Business alongside a related commercial agreement. At the same time, investors have become more focused on Symbotic’s premium valuation, backlog conversion timing, margin resilience, and heavy reliance on key customers such as Walmart,...

headline: Walmart Inc. (WMT) Shows How Faster Delivery and Cross-Border Access Can Lift Online Retail
